name: Truman Director
description: LLM-directed tick-based town simulator. The world tool exposes init | tick | inject_event; agent decisions are produced by the host LLM via sampling.
_comment: Publish/dev metadata only — slug/name/version/executa_type are read by `anna-app apps publish`; tool_id/type/enabled are read by `anna-app dev`. Per forum topic 140, the multi-platform binary download URLs are NOT kept here: configure them on the Anna platform Tool config page (Multi-platform Binary URLs) with entrypoint = `bin/<tool_id>` (the archive ships `bin/<tool_id>` + `manifest.json`). Run `python scripts/set-tool-id.py apply --tool <minted>` to rewrite the minted tool_id across pyproject.toml, executa.json and bundle/app.js once you mint one at https://anna.partners/executa. The plugin itself carries no tool_id — it is the callee, spawned by the console-script name. This dir is the `truman-director` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas.
